code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut p = 0
mut n = 0
mut i = 0
while i < parts.len()
  let tok = match parts.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if v > 0
    p = p + v
  else if v < 0
    n = n + v
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = p - n
println("r=#{r}")
